features specs.sample_value: sylan 2 shoe men'sdescriptionfeatures and specsfit and sizingmaterials and carereviewsquestions and answersdescriptionbuilt for confident speed, this shoe is for trail runners looking to move fast and maximize efficiency. the rockered shape of the midsole propels you from foot strike to toe off, while an ultra responsive supercritical foam compound maximizes energy return and reduces fatigue—helping you stay in pr mode all day long. a carbon fibre plate adds extra stability so you can let it rip on uneven terrain with confidence, and outsole lugs provide solid trail traction and kick off excess dirt. need more stability for technical terrain? try the vertex speed shoe.product tip: this shoe is designed for a precision fit, so it fits snug across the width of the foot with slightly less space in front of the toes. features and specstechnical featuresresponsive for efficiency and reduced fatiguepropulsive yet stablecomfortable for long effortsfootwear constructionintegrated flat knit tongue construction optimizes foot containment and improves airflow for breathability on hard effortssuperlight engineered woven upper for reduced weight and improved breathabilityrockered midsole with responsive new supercritical foam compound maximizes propulsion and energy returncarbon fibre plate in the midsole adds stability on trail terrainflat knit collar deflects debris from entry and improves fitsupercritical foam compound improves underfoot protection and reduces fatiguefootwear geometrystepped 4.5mm/3.5mm lugs provide optimized traction on trails plus improved dirt sheddingdrop (stack): 6mm (31.5mm : 25.5mm)footwear outsole constructionvibram® megagrip outsole with litebase technology delivers durable, surefooted performance across a range of conditions while shedding every gram possiblesustainabilitypfas (per and polyfluoroalkyl substances) compliantsize7, 7.5, 8, 8.5, 9, 9.5, 10, 10.5, 11, 11.5, 12, 12.5, 13weight (1/2 pair)268g / 10ozsizing chartfootwear sizing chartactivitytrail runmodelx000010155manufacturing facilityfreetrend industrial (vietnam) co. ltd., vietnamfit and sizinghow to choose your size for footwear with a default precision fit if you prefer a roomier comfort fit: choose ½ size larger than your measured foot length. if you want to stay with the default performance oriented precision fit: choose the size equal to your measured foot length. if you prefer a close technical fit: choose ½ size smaller than your measured foot length. view size chartmaterials and carematerialslining: textileinsole: stars.great shoe i’ve never had a better one.verified reviewer11 days agoas a runner who had the opportunity to thoroughly test the arc'teryx sylan in real mountain conditions, i can confidently say that this is an exceptionally well engineered piece of trail footwear that genuinely impressed me with its performance. from the very first impression, i appreciated the work of the designer their attention to detail, ergonomics, and technical execution is clearly evident. in my view, they have done an outstanding job and deserve recognition for successfully combining functionality with a modern, refined design. in the field, what stood out the most was the traction. the outsole delivers outstanding grip across a wide range of surfaces from wet rocks to loose, technical terrain. even at higher speeds, i felt confident and stable with every step, which is absolutely critical in mountain running. i was also very impressed with the cushioning. the shoe effectively absorbs impact while maintaining a responsive feel, avoiding any sense of dullness underfoot. even on longer runs, i experienced consistent comfort and stability without unnecessary strain on my feet. overall, i can say that the arc'teryx sylan is one of the best trail running shoes i have ever worn. arc'teryx deserves high praise for this model it is a technically refined, reliable, and high performance shoe.was
